subcodes.first_line: A Book unto him who hath hearkened unto My Call, turned unto My Countenance, and stood firm in My wondrous Cause, that the utterance may draw him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابی لمن سمع ندائی و اقبل الی وجهی و استقام علی امری البدیع لیجذبه بیان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
